zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：弱势震荡偏空整理
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD处于窄幅震荡格局，价格围绕1664附近运行，整体动能偏弱，短线缺乏明确方向，多空博弈加剧，市场等待突破信号短期偏弱延续中期

技术指标显示MACD持续为负值，空头动能占优，价格跌破SMA20均线，短期均线压制明显，但RSI缺失，需观察反弹力度确认趋势

下方支撑位关注1660一线，若失守可能下探1650区域，上方阻力位在1675至1685区间，多空分界关键需放量突破确认信号

操作上建议以区间交易为主，反弹接近阻力可轻仓做空，跌近支撑关注止跌反弹机会，严格止损控制风险避免追涨杀跌操作纪律优先执行。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading at 1664.34, hovering just above the session low and slightly below its 20-period SMA at 1671.2, indicating a mild bearish bias within a short-term consolidation. Price action over the past 24 hours has been compressed between 1673.25 and 1663.69, reflecting low volatility and market indecision. The inability to sustain levels above the moving average suggests weakening bullish momentum and a potential continuation of sideways-to-soft price structure.

Momentum indicators reinforce this cautious tone, with MACD at -15.25028 signaling sustained bearish pressure. Although the signal line is unavailable, the negative reading still reflects fading upside momentum and increasing seller control. The absence of RSI limits overbought or oversold clarity, but trading persistently below the SMA20 continues to indicate short-term weakness. Overall sentiment remains muted, with buyers struggling to generate follow-through strength.

Key support is located near the session low at 1663.69, with a break potentially exposing the 1650 psychological level and further downside toward 1625. On the upside, immediate resistance sits at 1671.2 (SMA20), followed closely by 1673.25, the recent high. A sustained break above this cluster would be required to shift the structure back toward neutral, with stronger resistance likely emerging near 1685 and the 1700 psychological zone.

Trading conditions favor a range-bound strategy with a slight bearish bias while price remains below the SMA20. Short-term traders may look to fade rallies into the 1671–1673 resistance zone with tight risk control, while breakdowns below 1663 could enable continuation toward lower supports. A confirmed close above resistance would invalidate near-term weakness and suggest recovery potential, but until then, disciplined positioning and controlled leverage remain important in this low-volatility environment.
